description: loadgen×e2e fusion final-validation profile: the WHOLE fusion surface in one run — a mix of basic_call + reinvite + prack_update + rerouting_prack, pooled Test-case identities (${seq}/${rand:N}) with a referenced Check set and an allowViolations waiver, production 1/1000 loss WITH auto-retransmit, and a 1/64 background recording gate (each sampled call is RFC-audited and its checks evaluated; the unsampled majority is counted only, keeping memory flat). This is a MODEST correctness validation, not a capacity run — resource-disciplined caps below. Drive it against the dev_sut playground with `--route-pin-to-uas` (api-call-pin egress, needed by rerouting_prack) and `--correlate to-user` (zero-SUT-cooperation correlation, NO header relay). ~10 cps for 60 s; POST /rate re-targets the rate live.
